text:
最近、強力なエネミーが、
リテム各地に数多く現れて、対応に苦慮している……。

すまないが、また力を貸してくれないか？
よろし
May I have a moment of your time?

Lately, extremely powerful enemies have been appearing in every
Retem region, and our forces are having a hard time dealing with them.

Would you lend us your strength once more?
I would be most grateful.
